steps.action: Click CLAUDE.md nav link via JS eval
steps.observed: CLAUDE.md Editor section shown with heading, file path, Save button
Textarea shows '# Matt Murray — Global Instructions' and full file content including Machines table, Preferences, Hard Rules sections

steps.action: Verify preview panel shows rendered content
steps.observed: Right-side PREVIEW panel shows rendered H1, paragraphs, and HTML table for Machines

steps.action: Prepend '## LIVE PREVIEW TEST' text to editor via JS eval
steps.observed: Editor content prepended with test text, length 1778 chars

steps.action: Click Save button via JS eval
Verify file on disk with head command
steps.expected: File starts with '## LIVE PREVIEW TEST'
steps.observed:
File starts with '## LIVE PREVIEW TEST

This text was added to test live preview.

# Matt Murray — Global Instructions'
Original content restored, verified with head -3

assertions.title: Live preview updates as user types

steps.observed: Editor loaded with original CLAUDE.md content and preview panel

steps.action: Prepend '## LIVE PREVIEW TEST\nThis text was added to test live preview.' to editor and dispatch input event
steps.expected: Preview panel updates to show new content
steps.observed: Preview panel immediately rendered 'LIVE PREVIEW TEST' as H2 heading and paragraph text alongside original content

steps.action: Take screenshot showing editor and preview side by side
steps.expected: Screenshot shows matching content in both panes
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms left pane has raw markdown '## LIVE PREVIEW TEST' and right pane shows rendered H2 'LIVE PREVIEW TEST'
File successfully moved, ls confirms file does not exist

steps.action: Reload page and navigate to CLAUDE.md editor
steps.expected: Editor shows empty/helpful state, no error
steps.observed: Editor shows empty textarea with placeholder 'Enter your CLAUDE.md content here...' and markdown syntax hints. Path shows '(new file)'. Preview shows 'No content'.

steps.action: Verify no JavaScript errors in console

steps.observed: File restored, content verified with head -3

evidence.network: GET /api/claude-md -> 200 (returns empty content for missing file)

frictions.description: SPA click handling: Playwright's click command times out on SPA nav links using addEventListener. Used eval with .click() as documented workaround.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to trigger .click() via JavaScript on data-section elements

frictions.description: Textarea not visible in agent-browser snapshot -i (not listed as interactive element). Had to use eval to interact with textarea by DOM ID.
frictions.resolution: Used eval to read/write textarea value via document.getElementById('claude-md-editor') and dispatched input events manually

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. The CLAUDE.md editor loads content correctly, saves changes to disk, provides live preview updates, and handles missing files gracefully with a helpful empty state.
